description_long: This object consists of three distinct potted plants arranged on a rectangular white table with slender gold legs, all set atop a black-and-white octagonal tile mat. The largest plant, in a tall dark vase, features broad, elongated green leaves and stands beside the table. On the tabletop, a medium-sized plant with palmate leaves is housed in a round, matte terracotta pot, while a smaller leafy plant sits in a simple gray pot. The table's clean lines and the geometric tile pattern beneath create a modern, urban aesthetic. The plants vary in size and leaf shape, adding visual interest and a touch of nature to the setting. The overall composition suggests a decorative arrangement suitable for contemporary indoor or semi-outdoor environments.
description: A modern arrangement of three potted plants on a white table with gold legs, set on a black-and-white geometric tile mat. The plants vary in size and pot style, creating a visually appealing, urban decorative display.
description_view_0: View 0 shows all three potted plants clearly, with the largest plant in a dark vase on the left, two smaller plants on the table, and the geometric tile mat fully visible.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the arrangement from a corner, highlighting the table's gold legs and the spatial relationship between the plants, with the largest plant partially behind the table.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a side perspective, emphasizing the tabletop plants and the curvature of the gold table legs, with the largest plant to the right.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the arrangement from the opposite side, with the largest plant in the foreground and the tabletop plants and mat receding into the background.
attribute_plant_species: Fiddle Leaf Fig (Ficus lyrata), Japanese Maple (Acer palmatum), generic leafy houseplant
